name: Allianz SE
lede: Allianz runs four centers across two Indian cities. Pune and Thiruvananthapuram, covering SSC and GCC/GIC, built over 23 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Allianz office in India. We map four, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Allianz SE GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Allianz runs 4 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Pune, Thiruvananthapuram), covering SSC and GCC/GIC. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Allianz's India footprint covers Pune and Thiruvananthapuram, spanning SSC and GCC/GIC. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 47 decision-makers, in one profile.
